title: spiraeanthemum brongniartianum
intro: Spiraeanthemum brongniartianum, also known as the New Caledonian spirea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Escalloniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in New Caledonia for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Spiraeanthemum brongniartianum include its ability to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to create herbal preparations for topical and internal use.
